release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 51. Improves the night glucose screen by using the OLED display space more aggressively, making the glucose value much larger from boundary to boundary, moving smaller trend arrows to the far-right side, and keeping the delta with unit in the lower-right corner. Includes previous clean night-screen support, random audio alarm fatigue protection, top-row time/update/Wi-Fi layout, insulin/status display refinements, caregiver WhatsApp routing, Wi-Fi profile improvements, and consolidated web UI structure.
